title: Stir Fry with Herbal Zest
description: A quick and easy stir fry recipe featuring herbal flavors and silky textures.

ingredients.name: Stir-fry vegetables
ingredients.notes: Choose your favorite vegetables such as broccoli, carrots, and bell peppers

instructions: Heat the herbal oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the garlic and ginger and stir-fry for 1 minute.
Add the stir-fry vegetables and cook until tender, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the silky tofu and cook until golden brown, about 2-3 minutes.
In a small bowl, whisk together the soy sauce and honey.
Pour the soy sauce mixture over the vegetables and tofu.
Stir-fry for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the sauce is bubbly.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped green onions.
